overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic metro station platform with industrial metal structures and glass walls overlooking the city, then entering a train car. The scene features cyberpunk aesthetic with neon advertisements, structural columns, and ends with a view of the player's cybernetic hands.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered metro platform with glass walls overlooking city

events.description: METABUILDING H7 sign becomes visible on left wall
large red car loan advertisement poster comes into view on left
pedestrian in white shirt passes close to camera on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the metro platform, observing advertisements and city views through the glass walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking toward camera along the platform

tall red advertisement poster showing car with text AS LOW AS 31.1%

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a covered metro platform with industrial metal architecture and large glass walls revealing a futuristic cityscape outside. The camera passes by a digital kiosk and approaches a large METABUILDING H7 sign and a prominent red car advertisement poster. A pedestrian in a white shirt walks past the camera in the opposite direction as the player continues toward the train.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro train interior with seated passengers

events.description: entering the train car from the platform, view shifts to interior seating
camera looks down to reveal player's cybernetic hands with visible implants and blood stains

agents.ego_description: entering the train car and sitting down, observing other passengers before looking down at own cybernetic hands

notable_agents.action: passenger in bright neon pink and green outfit sitting on bench looking at phone
passenger in dark clothing sitting on bench looking down

entered.detail: metal and plastic bench seating inside the train car
window showing the station platform and METABUILDING sign outside
first-person view of hands with metallic cybernetic implants and blood stains

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the platform into the interior of a metro train car. Two passengers are seated on a bench - one in dark clothing and another in a striking neon outfit. Through the train window, the station platform is still visible. The camera then tilts down to reveal the player's cybernetic hands with metallic implants, ending the clip with a close-up of the first-person perspective hands.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bustling, industrial metro platform into the sterile interior of a futuristic train car. It begins by gliding along a covered walkway characterized by metal architecture and expansive glass walls that overlook a sprawling cityscape, passing a digital kiosk and a prominent red car advertisement beneath a Metabuilding H7 sign. As a pedestrian in a white shirt crosses the path, the camera moves forward, transitioning seamlessly from the open platform into the enclosed space of the metro car. The scene then shifts to reveal passengers in dark and neon clothing seated on a bench, with the station platform still visible through the window. Finally, the camera tilts downward, moving from the environment to a close-up of the player's cybernetic hands and metallic implants.
